title: carpinus laxiflora var. fargesii
intro: Carpinus laxiflora var. fargesii, also known as Farges' hornbeam, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Betulaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Farges' hornbeam include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and alleviating digestive issues. It can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or dried herb for various herbal preparations, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to potential side effects and interactions.
